name: AgentOS
description: Deterministic orchestration framework for AI agents. Provides reproducible, auditable, and compliant execution layer for enterprise AI deployments.

funding.description: Funding will accelerate development of the core AgentOS runtime, including the deterministic shell, MCP integration, and audit layer. The goal is to reach a production-ready v1.0 release within 6 months.

milestones.description: Core workflow engine with YAML/BPMN parser
MCP client integration and tool registry

impact.problem: Enterprise AI deployments fail because AI agents cannot be trusted in systems with opaque behavior. 2025 revealed that AI reliability is bounded by system clarity.
impact.solution: AgentOS provides a deterministic shell around AI agents, ensuring reproducible execution, complete audit trails, and compliance-ready workflows.
beneficiaries: Enterprise teams deploying AI agents in production
Regulated industries requiring AI audit trails (finance, healthcare, government)

sustainability.description: Core AgentOS runtime is and will remain MIT licensed. Future enterprise features (advanced RBAC, SSO, analytics) may be offered as commercial add-ons.
